hooks.name: ijfw-session-start
hooks.description: Initialize IJFW state, emit startup banner with memory summary, register project in global registry.

hooks.name: ijfw-session-end
hooks.description: Save session metrics, write journal entry, emit savings receipt.

hooks.name: ijfw-before-agent
hooks.description: Deterministic vague-prompt detector. Injects sharpening context when prompt signals are weak.

hooks.name: ijfw-before-tool
hooks.description: Scan about-to-run commands for destructive patterns. Inject confirmation reminders before execution.

hooks.name: ijfw-after-tool
hooks.description: Trim tool output noise, capture error signals, emit cleaned output as additionalContext.

hooks.name: ijfw-after-agent
hooks.description: Post-agent cleanup: flush signal files, update session state.

hooks.name: ijfw-before-model
hooks.description: First-turn memory injection. Calls ijfw_memory_prelude on turn 1 and injects full project context directly before the model call.

hooks.name: ijfw-after-model
hooks.description: Response auto-memorize trigger. Detects decision/pattern signals in model output and queues ijfw_memory_store calls.

hooks.name: ijfw-before-tool-selection
hooks.description: Policy enforcement checkpoint before tool selection. Enforces ijfw.toml policy rules.

hooks.name: ijfw-notification
hooks.description: Relay Gemini notifications to IJFW journal for audit trail.

hooks.name: ijfw-pre-compress
hooks.description: Pre-compression hook: flush working memory signals and checkpoint session state before context compression.
